title: Korak 23

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Trebalo bi da odštampate 'name' updated to 'new_name'., gde new_name treba zameniti novom vrednošću _name.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
    import io
    import sys
        
    captured_output = io.StringIO()
    sys.stdout = captured_output
        
    empl = Employee("Frank", "trainee")
    empl.name = "Terry"
        
    sys.stdout = sys.__stdout__
    output = captured_output.getvalue()
        
    assert "'name' updated to 'Terry'." in output
`) })

description: Odmah nakon postavljanja atributa _name na new_name, ispiši 'name' updated to 'new_name'., pri čemu new_name treba zameniti novom vrednošću atributa _name.
